caption:
🔍 Google gives Gemini Notebook a cloud computer

Google renamed NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook and added a personal cloud computer to each notebook. This lets it write and run code inside notes. The feature is available only to AI Ultra and Workspace subscribers.

Gemini Notebook is an AI-powered note-taking tool that integrates coding capabilities directly within notes. Internal tests show the new version outperforms the old one by 65%, and by nearly 80% in complex web searches.

📊@tech

🇦🇺 Australia is planning some of the world's toughest AI regulations 

• Water usage will be limited

• AI data centers will be required to become net producers of energy

• AI companies can't train on Australian creators' work without their permission

• Proposals expected to be introduced as legislation in 2027

“Australian writers, musicians, artists and journalists must retain ownership and control of their work. Our laws will spell that out, plain as day ... anything less is theft".

@aipost 🏴

A new MIT study found a 55% drop in brain connectivity for people using ChatGPT versus those not using it, despite equal task performance. David Brooks proposes three emerging AI user types:

• Productive Passengers: Outsource thinking to AI, increasing output but risking cognitive decline.
• Reluctant Optimizers: Use AI for busywork but intervene for real thinking; the boundary shifts easily toward over-reliance.
• Mental Marathoners: Rare users who leverage AI to deepen, not avoid, complex thinking.

The competitive edge lies not in avoiding AI, but in knowing when to close ChatGPT and think independently first.

🔗: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2506.08872
